title: erlang BIFs batch 4 — hashing, time, and misc
purpose: Remaining erlang module BIFs needed across OTP: phash2 (portable hash), unique_integer (monotonic unique values), monotonic_time (monotonic clock), system_time (wall clock), and miscellaneous utilities.

requirements.title: Hashing BIFs
requirements.spec: erlang:phash2/1 and erlang:phash2/2 — portable term hashing matching BEAM's algorithm.
acceptance: Same term always produces same hash (deterministic)
Hash is consistent with ETS term hashing from B-091

requirements.title: Time BIFs
acceptance: monotonic_time() returns monotonically increasing native time units
system_time() returns wall clock in native time units
time_offset() returns the difference between system and monotonic time

requirements.title: Unique value BIFs
acceptance: unique_integer() returns unique values across calls

requirements.title: Misc utility BIFs
acceptance: min(1,2) returns 1, min(a,b) returns a (term ordering)
binary_to_term/term_to_binary round-trip using ETF from B-117

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement erlang:phash (legacy hash) — only phash2
SHALL NOT implement os:timestamp — use monotonic_time
binary_to_term/term_to_binary depend on B-117 ETF encoder/decoder
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
